    About This Project

    This interactive explorer presents faculty data extracted from University of Waterloo undergraduate calendar PDFs (1964–1994) and HTML web pages (1995–2006), spanning 42 years of institutional history.

    Data extraction: The 1964–1994 data was extracted using pdfplumber OCR on scanned calendar PDFs. The 1995–2006 data was scraped from HTML pages at ucalendar.uwaterloo.ca using Python (requests, BeautifulSoup). Faculty names, ranks, departments, degrees and administrative roles were parsed using regular expressions.

    Coverage: 3,846 unique faculty members across 54 departments from 6,719 individual records. Some years have sparser coverage due to OCR difficulty with older print layouts. The years 1963, 1976, 1988, 1995, and 1996 are absent due to extraction gaps.

    Inspired by Ian Milligan's UW Faculty History Explorer (1963–1978). This project extends that work through 2006, and further extraction to 2024 is in progress.

    Built with Python · Chart.js · GitHub Pages
